headline: AM Best Assigns Issue Credit Ratings to Chubb INA Holdings LLC’s Senior Unsecured Bonds
summary: OLDWICK, N.J., May 13, 2026--AM Best has assigned Long-Term Issue Credit Ratings of "a+" (Excellent) to Chubb INA Holdings LLC (Chubb) (Delaware) recently announced CNY 4.0 billion (approximately USD 586 million) issuance of senior unsecured bonds in the Hong Kong market in two tranches, which are guaranteed by Chubb Limited: CNY 2.5 billion 2.4% senior unsecured bonds due 2031; and CNY 1.5 billion 2.85% senior unsecured bonds due 2036. headline: Combined Canada Introduces New Cancer Care Insurance Product to Help Canadians Manage the Financial Impact of Cancer
summary: Combined Canada, a Chubb Benefits Company and leading provider of supplemental accident, health, disability, and life insurance products in Canada, today announced the launch of Combined Cancer Care, a new insurance product designed to help Canadians navigate the financial challenges associated with a cancer diagnosis.

headline: Travelers' Net Investment Income Aids Profitability and Growth
summary: TRV's growing investment income helps offset underwriting pressure and support earnings growth.
